analysis.summary: Rocket.Chat is an open-source team communication platform built on Meteor/Node.js that provides real-time messaging, omnichannel customer support, and collaborative workspace features with role-based access control and extensive integration capabilities.
capabilities: Real-time messaging and chat functionality with WebSocket support (apps/meteor/app/lib/server/methods/sendMessage.ts, WebSocket handlers)
Two-factor authentication with TOTP and email verification (apps/meteor/app/2fa/server/)
Omnichannel customer support with transcript generation (ee/apps/omnichannel-transcript/)
REST API with comprehensive endpoint coverage (apps/meteor/app/api/server/)
File upload and storage with S3 and Google Cloud integration (apps/meteor dependencies @aws-sdk, @google-cloud/storage)
Video conferencing integration with WebRTC (apps/meteor dependencies)
User presence tracking and status management (ee/apps/presence-service/)
Push notifications via FCM and APN (apps/meteor dependencies @parse/node-apn)
OAuth2 server functionality (apps/meteor dependency @node-oauth/oauth2-server)
PDF generation for transcripts and reports (dependencies @react-pdf/renderer)
Email processing and SMTP integration (apps/meteor/app/api/server/lib/emailInbox.ts)
Rate limiting and security controls (apps/meteor/app/api/server/)
Multi-tenant workspace support with role-based permissions
App marketplace and custom app development platform (dependencies @rocket.chat/apps-engine)
integrations: AWS S3 for file storage (@aws-sdk packages)

api_endpoints.path: Various REST API endpoints under /api/v1/ namespace (apps/meteor/app/api/server/)

technical_facts: Real-time messaging and chat functionality with WebSocket support (apps/meteor/app/lib/server/methods/sendMessage.ts, WebSocket handlers)
Two-factor authentication with TOTP and email verification (apps/meteor/app/2fa/server/)
Omnichannel customer support with transcript generation (ee/apps/omnichannel-transcript/)
REST API with comprehensive endpoint coverage (apps/meteor/app/api/server/)
File upload and storage with S3 and Google Cloud integration (apps/meteor dependencies @aws-sdk, @google-cloud/storage)
Video conferencing integration with WebRTC (apps/meteor dependencies)
User presence tracking and status management (ee/apps/presence-service/)
Push notifications via FCM and APN (apps/meteor dependencies @parse/node-apn)
OAuth2 server functionality (apps/meteor dependency @node-oauth/oauth2-server)
PDF generation for transcripts and reports (dependencies @react-pdf/renderer)

architecture_patterns: Concurrency: async/await with Node.js event loop, Meteor Fibers for legacy code, microservices communication via NATS
deployment_options: CI/CD: GitHub Actions (multiple workflow files in .github/)

functional_dna.logic_archetype_evidence: Real-time messaging and chat functionality with WebSocket support (apps/meteor/app/lib/server/methods/sendMessage.ts, WebSocket handlers), User presence tracking and status management (ee/apps/presence-service/), microservices architecture with NATS message broker
functional_dna.data_contract_evidence: MongoDB 6.16.0 (multiple package.json files), TypeScript (5843 .ts files, package.json typescript ~5.9.3), REST API with comprehensive endpoint coverage
functional_dna.core_algorithmic_evidence: NATS message broker (nats ^2.28.2), Moleculer microservices framework (moleculer ^0.14.35), WebSocket support for real-time state synchronization across distributed services
functional_dna.concurrency_evidence: NATS message broker for async communication, WebSocket handlers for real-time messaging, microservices architecture with distributed state management
functional_dna.repurposing_reasoning: High confidence due to modular microservices architecture with clear separation of concerns. Core real-time messaging, presence tracking, and orchestration patterns are highly reusable across domains requiring collaborative features.

evidence_claims.claim: Real-time messaging capabilities with WebSocket support
evidence_claims.evidence: Real-time messaging and chat functionality with WebSocket support (apps/meteor/app/lib/server/methods/sendMessage.ts, WebSocket handlers)
NATS message broker (nats ^2.28.2), Moleculer microservices framework (moleculer ^0.14.35)
User presence tracking and status management (ee/apps/presence-service/)
File upload and storage with S3 and Google Cloud integration (apps/meteor dependencies @aws-sdk, @google-cloud/storage)

information_gaps: Database schema details beyond MongoDB usage
Message queue depth and processing guarantees
